data.name: ElvenEscape
data.detailed_description:
Help Ann Varissa escape captivity from the demon in this stylized pixel 2D top-down shooting!
Remember to keep a safe distance while killing demons with a variety of bows and weapons.
Suffer the consequences of defeat with BDSM H-scenes and detailed CGs! Will you lead her to escape or humiliation?



◇ Top-Down shooting
◇ Stylized pixel graphic
◇ Explore the dungeon to discover the magic item
◇ What happens if you get caught? Submit to their merciless capture with H-scenes!



The devil army attacks the elven high school. They kidnap all of the elf schoolgirls to be their slaves.
However, in the prison, one elf girl finds a way out of the prison cell and tries to escape.

data.short_description: Help Ann Varissa escape captivity from the demon in this stylized pixel 2D top-down shooting! Remember to keep a safe distance while killing demons with a variety of bows and weapons. Suffer the consequences of defeat with BDSM H-scenes and detailed CGs!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: WIN10/WIN11
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
